reason: Successfully navigated to the application, found and clicked the specified agent, verified its status, sent a math question, waited for and received a correct response mentioning "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — page loaded successfully with title "Gamut"
Found agent "QA-20260722-181236-p8uw" in the sidebar — agent was visible in the left sidebar with "idle" status
Clicked on agent "QA-20260722-181236-p8uw" in sidebar — successfully opened the agent detail page and chat view
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — status displayed as "idle" in the top right of the page, meeting the requirement
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — message appeared in the input field correctly
Clicked the "Send message" button — message was submitted, agent status changed to "working", chat session created with title "Simple Math Question Discussion"
Waited for response from the agent — response arrived within 1 second
Verified response mentions "4" — the agent's response clearly displayed "4" as the answer, with timestamp showing "Worked for 1s"
Took screenshot showing the final response — screenshot captured showing the user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and the agent's response "4"
